name: Crockpot Moroccan Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar.
2. Add eggs one at a time. Beat until smooth.
3. Stir in vanilla.
4. Combine applesauce and baking soda. Stir in flour, cinnamon, and salt.
5. Mix in chocolate chips, dates, and walnuts.
6. Pour into a greased and floured 2 quart pudding mold.
7. Place the mold in the crockpot.
8. Cover with 4 layers of paper towels.
9. Loosely place the lid on top of the crockpot to allow steam to escape.
10. Cook on High for 3 to 3 1/2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
